title: If You're a Biped, I Can Make U Limp
content:
{{Top|ca|leg}} {{InUniverseMedia |image= |name="If You're a Biped,
I Can Make U Limp" |author=[[Boba Fett and the Assassin Droids]]''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' |editor= |illustrator= |artist= |performer=Boba Fett and the Assassin Droids |publisher= |release date= |media type=[[Music/Legends|Song]] |pages= |published in=Single |genre=[[Core Drive/Legends|Core Drive]]The article {{SW|url=news/slugthrowers-part-2|series=Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|text=Part 2|nolive=1}} establishes that the [[Band/Legends|band]] [[Boba Fett and the Assassin Droids]] performed in the [[Core Drive/Legends|Core Drive]] genre of [[Music/Legends|music]]. }} "'''If You're a Biped, I Can Make U Limp'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] authored and performed by the [[Band/Legends|band]] [[Boba Fett and the Assassin Droids]]. The track was an example of the [[Core Drive/Legends|Core Drive]] genre, and it was released as a single in the period of [[Time/Legends|time]] between the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' is set in the [[Time/Legends|time period]] between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Those battles are dated to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], respectively, by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', which also establishes the Battle of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]] as the final event before the beginning of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. ==Behind the scenes== "If You're a Biped, I Can Make U Limp" was mentioned in the [[1993]] book ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'', written by [[Simon Smith]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann|Eric Trautmann]]. The book was a supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. ==Sources== *''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Songs by Boba Fett and the Assassin Droids]]
